title: layia elegans
intro: Layia elegans, also known as the mountain daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Layia elegans include reducing inflammation, promoting healing, and supporting the immune system, which can help to prevent illnesses and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Layia elegans can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
